body.title: D259: author-aware cloud routing for CC and human turns
body.result: D259: _bg_reason() now accepts is_user_turn+complexity; job dispatch lambda threads author→_HUMAN_AUTHORS check; claude-code and akien get is_user_turn=True+complexity=parsed.complexity for background jobs. _HUMAN_AUTHORS constant at module level. Syntax OK.
body.description: When originating author is claude-code or human, all downstream inference (including background job synthesis) must set cloud_ok_override=True and is_user_turn=True, overriding background-mode suppression. Root cause: CC messages hit habits that dispatch background jobs with is_background=True, blocking OR escalation even when available and user is waiting. Fix: thread author through _process_inner into background job dispatch and InferenceContext.
